summary: The diff shows branding changes applied to App.tsx (footer updated to Nirgrantha), RoleSelectionLanding.tsx, and RoleLoginPage.tsx. However, the requirement explicitly calls for changes in the dashboard shells (StudentDashboard.tsx, FacultyIntelligenceHub.tsx, InstituteCommandCenter.tsx, ParentInsightPortal.tsx) and sub-components under frontend/src/components/tabs/. There is no direct diff evidence showing EduManage was removed from FacultyIntelligenceHub.tsx, InstituteCommandCenter.tsx, ParentInsightPortal.tsx, or the tabs sub-components. The footer in App.tsx is confirmed updated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace every occurrence of 'EduManage' in dashboard shells FacultyIntelligenceHub.tsx, InstituteCommandCenter.tsx, and ParentInsightPortal.tsx
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows modifications to App.tsx, frontend-file-summaries.txt, and project_state.json. There is no diff evidence that FacultyIntelligenceHub.tsx, InstituteCommandCenter.tsx, or ParentInsightPortal.tsx were modified to remove EduManage branding.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace every occurrence of 'EduManage' in all sub-components under frontend/src/components/tabs/
missing_requirements.reason: No files under frontend/src/components/tabs/ appear in the modified files list. The diff does not provide evidence that EduManage was removed from any of the tabs sub-components.
